column3: Enter your team members' names above to use them below. It will show the members with the most loot in blue and the least in yellow.
Enter numbers into the Adjust boxes if you want to track loot that members got from outside the raid team, or from before they joined your team.

column2: To add more weeks: Copy any week table (4 rows) and paste it immediately below the last week table.
column18: If Recipient is (Other), specify further details in Notes. (e.g., PUG won it, dropped to floor, 0-1 coffer, etc.)
